body.title: Harden HYPOTHESIZE prompt: explicit JSON schema + few-shot + anti-hallucination
body.result: CC implemented: _parse_hypothesis strips <think> blocks (DeepSeek) and <function_calls> (Haiku). HYPOTHESIZE prompt hardened with explicit schema + few-shot + anti-hallucination rules. Igor also improved the prompt text.
body.description: Current HYPOTHESIZE prompt lets the model respond in any format. Tighten it: (1) explicit output schema — 'produce exactly one JSON object with old_string and new_string keys, nothing else outside the JSON', (2) one few-shot example of a correct edit in the prompt, (3) negative constraint — 'do not produce <tool_response> blocks, do not narrate, do not simulate tool output, only output the JSON edit object'. DeepSeek R1 models: allow <think> block before the JSON (reasoning is free), require JSON after. File: wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py HYPOTHESIZE section.
